plate.comment:
Returns the item type flag/field from the ItemTypeData table.

Algorithm:
1. Validate nItemTypeIndex is >= -1 and < sgptDataTables[1].dwField24
2. Calculate pointer: pItemTypeRec = nItemTypeIndex * 0xE4 + sgptDataTables[1].dwField20
3. Check pItemTypeRec is non-NULL
4. Return pItemTypeRec->bField10, or 0 on validation failure

Parameters:
  nItemTypeIndex: int - item type table index to look up

Returns:
  byte: bField10 value from the item type record. Returns 0 if index out of bounds.

Special Cases:
  - Returns 0 for invalid index (index < -1 or >= dwField24)
  - Returns 0 if calculated record pointer is NULL

Structure Layout:
  Offset | Size | Field     | Type   | Description
  +0x00  | 4    | dwField20 | uint   | Base pointer to ItemTypeDataEntry array (table load)
  +0x24  | 4    | dwField24 | uint   | Entry count for item type table
  ItemTypeDataEntry stride = 0xE4
  +0x10  | 1    | bField10  | byte   | Item type flag field (returned value)

Source: ..\Source\D2Common\DATATBLS\DataTbls.cpp

tags.name: CONF_LIVE
tags.comment: CONF axis (equivalence proof), rung 3/4. Proven bit-exact LIVE via the D2Debugger direct-call oracle on chosen inputs against the running game (GRADUATED_CONFORMANCE_PIPELINE_PLAN.md). Mutually exclusive with CONF_DRAFT/CONF_VECTORS/CONF_BATTLETESTED.
